conditions: The Solar Tablet Fragment is a post- Plantera Hardmode crafting material used to craft the Solar Tablet , which summons the Solar Eclipse event . Solar Tablet Fragments have a 4/5 (80%) chance of being found in Lihzahrd Chests , and also have a 1/7 (14.29%) chance of being dropped by Lihzahrds and Flying Snakes in the Jungle Temple .
The Mace is a pre-Hardmode flail found in Gold Chests located in the underground or cavern layer .

The Magical Pumpkin Seed is a pet-summoning item that spawns a Squashling that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, the Squashling will twirl and fly after the player to catch up to them. The Magical Pumpkin Seed has a 1/200 (0.5%) chance of being obtained from harvesting fully-grown Pumpkins during the Halloween seasonal event .

The Magic Conch is a tool that teleports the player to the Ocean that is furthest away from them 0.75 seconds (45 ticks) [ 1 ] after being used. [ 2 ] Like the Magic Mirror and Demon Conch , it can be used limitlessly. The Magic Conch can be found in Sandstone Chests in the top 4/7ths of the Underground Desert and Oasis Crates and Mirage Crates obtained from fishing in the Oasis .

notes: The Magic Hat is a pre-Hardmode armor piece that can be equipped in the helmet slot. While equipped, it grants +2 defense and increases the player's magic damage and magic critical strike chance by 6% each. It is purchased from the Traveling Merchant for 3 GC .

The Magic Lantern is a light pet-summoning item that spawns a small glowing Magic Lantern which hovers above the player, emitting dim yellow light. The lantern will also expose all treasure within up to 15 tiles from the lantern's location, overlaying small yellow sparkles over nearby valuable treasure, which is similar to the sparkling effect produced by a Spelunker Potion . The Magic Lantern can be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant for 10 GC during the night of a full moon .

chanceText: 2.5% (Desktop, Console and Mobile versions) 1.25% (Old-gen console and 3DS versions)

notes: The Magic String is a Hardmode , post-one mechanical boss accessory that can be purchased from the Skeleton Merchant for 1 PC . While equipped, all yoyos and Counterweights are thrown when ⚒ Use / Attack is released, instead of being retracted. The released projectiles deal 75% of their initial damage and knockback, and can bounce and roll on blocks and platforms . [ 1 ]

conditions: The Marble Chest is a chest storage item found only in Underground Cabins within Marble Caves . Like Granite Chests and Rich Mahogany Chests , Marble Chests have exactly the same loot as Gold Chests .

The Marble Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in Marble Caves , considered unsafe . It does not drop as an item when destroyed. It can also be generated as part of an Underground Cabin in a Marble Cave, considered safe . It is also considered a safe wall when placed by the player.

notes: The Marshmallow is a food item that grants the Well Fed buff when consumed. This lasts for 1 minute, but can be canceled at any time by right-clicking the icon ( ) , by selecting the icon using Cycle Next/Previous Buff and then pressing Remove Buff ( ) , or by double-tapping the buff icon ( ) . Marshmallows can be purchased from the Merchant for 1 SC each when he is spoken to in a Snow biome .

The Mechanical Lens is an informational accessory which will reveal placed wires and actuators . Each color of wire can be shown at maximum brightness, regular, or faded, which is configurable by the toggles . The Mechanical Lens is purchased from the Mechanic for 1 GC .

conditions: The Meteorite Bar is a pre-Hardmode bar . In addition to being crafted, Meteorite Bars can also be found as common items in Shadow Chests , or more rarely in Gold Chests in the Cavern layer that generate close to the Underworld .

notes: The Mime Mask is a vanity item equipped in the Social Helmet slot. It is purchased from the Clothier during a Blood Moon for 2 GC .
sourceRefName: Clothier during a Blood Moon for

notes: The Booster Track is purchased from the Mechanic for 50 SC .

The Minishark is a pre-Hardmode gun that can be purchased from the Arms Dealer for 35 GC . When used, it rapidly fires bullets at a slight spread, with each shot having a 1/3 (33.33%) chance of not consuming any ammunition .

The Mollusk Whistle is a mount-summoning item that summons a rideable Flamingo . The Flamingo mount allows players to float in water , similar to using an Inner Tube , and dive by holding ▼ Down . The mount bobs to the surface when the ▼ Down key is released, and if deep enough, the player will launch out of the water into the air. The Mollusk Whistle can be purchased from the Zoologist for 20 GC after filling out 25% (137 entries) of the Bestiary .

The Moon Globe is a thrown consumable item purchased from the Zoologist for 3 GC after the Bestiary is 50% complete (273 entries). When a Moon Globe is thrown and shatters on a surface, the world's moon style will be randomized to one of 9 options.

conditions: Moonglow is a type of herb which appears as a bent stalk with a drooping blue-white flower. It grows naturally on regular Jungle grass . Moonglow can be harvested with virtually any weapon or tool , and can be planted manually using Moonglow Seeds in Clay Pots and Planter Boxes , or on suitable soil tiles .

Moonglow Seeds are a type of seed that can be obtained from harvesting Moonglows while they are blooming or using the Staff of Regrowth on naturally grown Moonglows while they are fully grown. Moonglow will only bloom at night , and will glow and give off blue orbs of light. Each plant drops 1–3 Moonglow Seeds when harvested while blooming.

The Moon Lord Torso is a vanity item equipped in the body slot. It is exclusive to For the Worthy and Zenith worlds, where it has a 1/5 (20%) to be found as secondary loot in Locked Gold Chests and Biome Chests (except desert chest) in the Dungeon , and the same chance to drop from Golden Lock Boxes obtained from fishing in the Dungeon. [ 1 ]

The Mouse is a critter that spawns in the Underground and Cavern layers, but not in Ice , Crimson , Corruption , Jungle or Hallow biomes. It can also spawn in front of unsafe Living Wood Walls below the surface at a much higher rate. Its small size and speed can make it difficult to spot even in well-lit conditions, although it occasionally squeaks. The Mouse has only 5 health and no defense , and can only be damaged by players.

notes: The Mud Bud is a Hardmode , post- Plantera pet-summoning item that spawns Plantero , a miniature version of Plantera, that follows the player. When the player is far enough away or in midair, Plantero flies towards them in a manner similar to Plantera's second form while emitting a trail of falling leaves that are affected by wind . The Mud Bud can be purchased from the Zoologist for 50 GC after defeating Plantera .

conditions: The Mudstone Brick Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in Jungle Shrines in some worlds. It drops as an item when destroyed, and can also be obtained via crafting. It is always considered a safe wall .

The Mud Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in the Jungle and occasionally the Underground Jungle , considered unsafe . It does not drop as an item when destroyed, and can only be obtained on Desktop , Console , and Mobile , via crafting. It is considered a safe wall when placed by the player.
The Mushroom is a pre-Hardmode crafting material and recovery potion that spawns randomly on grass or Hallowed grass on the surface layer. It can be harvested with any tool or weapon .
The Mushroom is a pre-Hardmode crafting material and recovery potion that spawns randomly on grass or Hallowed grass on the surface layer. It can be harvested with any tool or weapon .

notes: The Mushroom Cap is a vanity hat purchased from the Truffle for 2 GC . It greatly resembles a Glowing Mushroom without the stalk.

conditions: Mushroom Chests are chests that can be found inside Underground Cabins in Glowing Mushroom biomes .

notes: Mushroom Grass Seeds are seeds that have a 1/40 (2.5%) chance to drop from harvesting Glowing Mushrooms . The seeds can also be purchased from the Dryad for 1 SC 50 CC each if she is spoken to in a Glowing Mushroom biome . Shaking a Giant Glowing Mushroom occasionally yields Mushroom Grass Seeds as well.

The Mushroom Spear is a Hardmode , post-one mechanical boss spear that can be purchased from the Truffle for 70 GC . When thrust, it summons seven spinning mushrooms that linger in midair and deal 33.33% of the weapon's damage (20 base damage) but do not inflict knockback . [ 1 ]

conditions: The Mushroom Wall is a type of background wall which can be found naturally generated in Underground Cabins in the Glowing Mushroom biome , considered safe . It is also considered a safe wall when placed by the player.
